actor.structure:
Actor(
  (embedder): EmbeddingNet(
    (embedder): Linear(in_features=9, out_features=16, bias=False)
  )
  (encoder): mySequential(
    (0): MultiHeadEncoder(
      (MHA_sublayer): MultiHeadAttentionsubLayer(
        (MHA): MultiHeadAttention()
        (Norm): Normalization()
      )
      (FFandNorm_sublayer): FFandNormsubLayer(
        (FF): Sequential(
          (0): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=16, bias=True)
          (1): ReLU(inplace=True)
          (2): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=16, bias=True)
        )
        (Norm): Normalization()
      )
    )
  )
  (embedder_for_decoder): EmbeddingNet(
    (embedder): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=16, bias=False)
  )
  (decoder): mySequential(
    (0): MultiHeadEncoder(
      (MHA_sublayer): MultiHeadAttentionsubLayer(
        (MHA): MultiHeadAttention()
        (Norm): Normalization()
      )
      (FFandNorm_sublayer): FFandNormsubLayer(
        (FF): Sequential(
          (0): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=16, bias=True)
          (1): ReLU(inplace=True)
          (2): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=16, bias=True)
        )
        (Norm): Normalization()
      )
    )
  )
  (mu_net): MLP(
    (net): Sequential(
      (layer0-linear): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=32, bias=True)
      (layer0-drop_out): Dropout(p=0, inplace=False)
      (layer0-activation): LeakyReLU(negative_slope=0.01)
      (layer1-linear): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=8, bias=True)
      (layer1-drop_out): Dropout(p=0, inplace=False)
      (layer1-activation): LeakyReLU(negative_slope=0.01)
      (layer2-linear): Linear(in_features=8, out_features=1, bias=True)
      (layer2-drop_out): Dropout(p=0, inplace=False)
    )
  )
  (sigma_net): MLP(
    (net): Sequential(
      (layer0-linear): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=32, bias=True)
      (layer0-drop_out): Dropout(p=0, inplace=False)
      (layer0-activation): LeakyReLU(negative_slope=0.01)
      (layer1-linear): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=8, bias=True)
      (layer1-drop_out): Dropout(p=0, inplace=False)
      (layer1-activation): LeakyReLU(negative_slope=0.01)
      (layer2-linear): Linear(in_features=8, out_features=1, bias=True)
      (layer2-drop_out): Dropout(p=0, inplace=False)
    )
  )
)

Pom.structure:
Policy(
  (sm): SMBND()
  (agen): GBMutModel(
    (fq1): Sequential(
      (0): Linear(in_features=100, out_features=1000, bias=True)
      (1): Tanh()
    )
    (fk1): Sequential(
      (0): Linear(in_features=100, out_features=1000, bias=True)
      (1): Tanh()
    )
    (w): Sequential(
      (0): Linear(in_features=2, out_features=100, bias=True)
      (1): Tanh()
    )
  )
  (crgen): GBLearnCrRate(
    (net): Sequential(
      (0): Linear(in_features=3, out_features=4, bias=True)
      (1): ReLU()
      (2): LayerNorm((4,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
      (3): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=1, bias=True)
      (4): Sigmoid()
    )
  )
)

)
